inputs.prompt: image 1 is CHARACTER_NAME. image 2 is PLAYER_NAME. Use the art style, line art, shading, and colour palette from image 1 (CHARACTER_NAME) for the entire scene. Keep CHARACTER_NAME EXACTLY as shown in image 1. Do NOT change CHARACTER_NAME's eye colour, hair colour, or outfit to match the scene description — keep all of CHARACTER_NAME's appearance from image 1. Render PLAYER_NAME with ONLY the face shape, hair colour, and eye colour from image 2, drawn in the same art style as image 1. Do NOT copy PLAYER_NAME's hat, clothing, or accessories onto CHARACTER_NAME or any other character in the scene.
